programme.title: Hart 216
programme.desc: Hart 216

programme.title: Cagney and Lacey
programme.desc: hen a Jane Doe homeless lady is murdered Chris vows to find out who she is Meanwhile Chris and Mary Beth shoot a recruiting commercial for the NYPD while Mary Beth is fighting a nasty cold

programme.title: Starsky 304
programme.desc: Starsky 304

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: North and South Limbawe are in conflict over oil and a despotic General plans to overthrow his own government in South Limbawe and attacks his neighbors to the North String and Dom are sent by Archangel to aid North Limbawe and its leader Seku Logana but Logana has his own prejudices about receiving aid for his cause Also in the mix is an old Vietnam buddy of Hawkes Marty Vidor who is working as a mercenary for South Limbawe and Hawke is hesitant to take him on since Vidor just may know the location of the missing Saint John

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A woman is driven to murder when her newborns cursed cradle seeks revenge

programme.desc: A cowboy detective goes up against a gang of big-city thugs trying to set up a protection racket out west

programme.title: Round up Time in Texas
programme.desc: Gene and Frog arrive with a herd of horses for Genes brother a diamond prospector whose work has attracted the interest of a bunch of bad guys

programme.title: My Pal Trigger
programme.desc: Gabby refuses to mate his stallion with Roys horse When his horse runs away from the house he blames Roy and gets him jailed

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Lukes recently married henpecked cousin Charlie and his wife come to visit

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa Luke and Kate spend the weekend at a posh hotel in Los Angeles while there to attend the Sons of the Mystic Nile convention

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The new kid on the block is having trouble fitting in so Mister Ed comes up with a plan to help him win friends

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: When Wilbur balks at buying a new car for Carol she hitches up a buggy to Mister Ed Ed then reports her to the SPCA

programme.desc: Frank Barker wants Joe to help him get a firearms license for the Fielder Militia The LAPD knows that the militias weapons are stolen from the Army so they have Joe string Barker along until they can arrest him and grab the weapons

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A couple tricks Dr Kimble into helping an injured young boy who is a hemophiliac and whom they have kidnapped for a 200000 ransom

programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: Trapped in a missile silo a small team of scientists civilians and trigger-happy soldiers battle desperately to ensure the survival of the human race but tension inside the base is reaching breaking-point and the zombies are gathering outside

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to Photo Finish a phony psychic channeler becomes possessed by Freddy Krueger Meanwhile Freddy makes a surprise appearance at his class reunion to get even with the prom date who scorned him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways try to contact two astronauts in a space capsule orbiting over the island but they fail However they may get a second chance when an unmanned capsule they are trying to make contact with lands on the island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: In order to secure a loan from the bank Grampa must sign title to the McCoy farm over to his grandson Luke

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys dig up a brontosaurus leg bone on their property Kate wants to donate the bone to a museum but Grampa would rather cash in on a roadside stand tourist attraction

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Its a three-ring circus for BJ and the Bear when theyre made monkeys in the middle between a shady circus promoter nasty gangsters and a daredevil motorcycle stunt woman with a heart of gold

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur is all set to enjoy a weeks vacation relaxing at home but his plans are ruined when his overbearing Aunt Martha and her talking parrot unexpectedly drop by for a prolonged visit

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sgt Carter tries to make Gomer dislike him before graduation feeling that he hasnt done his job correctly if he isnt hated by ALL the recruits Sgt Carter asks for a transfer to California but things dont go quite as he expects

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While in town on pass Sgt Carter decides to play a joke on Gomer by setting him on a quest to get a kiss from The Dragon Lady but in order for it to work he will need Dukes help

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways find a headhunter tribes totem pole on the island The head on the top of it bears an uncanny resemblance to Gilligan--which comes in handy when the headhunters return to the island

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: When two vagrants come across an attempted hit and one of them is killed The other calls Dan When Dan goes to the place and asks Nelson to meet him and there are no signs of a hit Dan then sees the vagrant; an old friend Dan believes her and sets out to prove it Later some men tell Dan to back off which he doesnt Dan learns that the government may be involved And the hit men set out to find her

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Jonathan and Jennifer are in Hawaii for a croquet tournament when a tournament official is stabbed and the Harts wind up in an international dilemma involving the KGB MI-6 the CIA and a fancy key that may unlock deadly secrets

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Stephanie receives a blood transfusion after an appendectomy not knowing that it was one of the Darryls who gave her blood

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Michael is fired after insulting the daughter of WPIVs new owner and the only work he can find is as a shoe salesman

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: In order to research for an article on group therapy she is doing Polly takes along MacGillis to a group therapy weekend where in order to write the article they are required to participate Elizabeth holds a small party while the two are out of the house which gets out of control

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways desperately try to find a new water source as they have completely exhausted their current water supply

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch Griff and Ryan investigate a series of vicious murders which were committed by a half-human half-fish woman known as Silver Eyes who is looking to procreate with a man

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team wonders whats up with Sonia as she wrestles with Lous big secret Ronnie goes undercover and takes a gold digging RO out on a date but when Carlos lets the cat out of the bag all hell breaks loose

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team wonders whats up with Sonia as she wrestles with Lous big secret Ronnie goes undercover and takes a gold digging RO out on a date but when Carlos lets the cat out of the bag all hell breaks loose Matt and Froy struggle with language barriers when an Italian photographer and his assistant resorts to violence because they cant comprehend Will Sonia finally reveal whats happening or will carrying her brothers burden get the best of her

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.title: The Black Tent
programme.desc: In the African desert a British soldier romances the native chiefs daughter and helps the tribe fight off a Nazi attack

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke help family friend Mary Kaye Porter elude a crime boss whos after the 100000 trust fund for Mary Kayes unborn child

programme.title: Hercules 201
programme.desc: Hercules 201

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: An escaped Jiridian takes Lili hostage Their shuttle is sucked on to a Kimera ship where they with Liam have to go through an obstacle course to get to the core to exit

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Mana forces a dying surgeon to conduct experiments on patients in his hospital attempting to implant alien embryos into human hosts

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Carla Jeffries uses Arcanes own scheming ways against him to take over his complex the doctor and Swamp Thing must work together to save both the swamp and Arcanes life

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Arcane hires mercenaries to kill Swamp Thing the injured creature uses Anne Fisks equipment to try to heal himself temporarily becoming human again Tressa discovers his secret and tries to help him

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A vessel of alien pacifists bound for Earth lands on the moon They are greeted as friends by all- except Commissioner Simmons who sees their vessel as way to return home

programme.title: Attack of the Giant Leaches
programme.desc: Fear grips a nondescript city after its residents disappear mysteriously from across the town Surprisingly a gamekeeper stumbles upon the role of blood-sucking leeches behind the disappearances

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss gets Uncle Jesse to enter a contest for a new type of fossil fuel saying that moonshine is the perfect way to cut down on pollution However Boss has more up his sleeve He plans to tip off the authorities and once Jesse is arrested take credit for the idea himself

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Cody enlists the help of self-proclaimed preacher Gideon Poole but regrets it when he learns the truth about him

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Officer Jimmy Vegas personal vendetta against a local drug dealer threatens to ruin both his and Inspector Kellers careers

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: IMF team leader Dan Briggs assembles his team for the first time The mission to recover two nuclear warheads belonging to General Rio Dominguez from a hotel vault in Santa Costa Jim and Willy sneak safe-cracker Terry Targo into the vault who figures out how to get out The team then captures Dominguez but Targos fingers are broken in the attempt With no other alternative Briggs has himself and Dominguez put into the vault and Briggs threatens to enter a random combination if Alicio doesnt tell him the code Dominguez breaks With the bombs defused Willy takes the warheads out of the vault Briggs remains behind and uses the information Targo gathered earlier to get out during a fireworks distraction set off by Barney Briggs and the rest of the team make a desperate race for safety and get onto a plane heading to safety seconds before the military can catch up to them

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate a series of burglaries that are taking place during the day and the victims are those with a recent wedding or death in the family A senior citizen uses the paper to find homes that are empty during the day

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An ex-con who places an ad in a newspaper gets a reply referring to making a killing for 1000 He turns the reply over to Friday and Gannon who investigate the possibility that the replier is soliciting murder

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.desc: Erivan Pereira v. Ariom Damkovsky

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Wisniewski’s development as a fighter was a family affair, as he and his brother watched tapes of MMA battles then trained in the front yard. Oganov honed his skills in Serbia, while enrolled in the Red Army.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Derek Lapierre v. Adam Zarrillo.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Antonin Marconi v. Rachid Magmadi

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Dylan Schellenberg

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 31 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Ethan Cornect vs. Andy Jack; David "Red Beard" Swanson vs. Chris Chapman [title fight].

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Smith v. Gareth Millar

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 31 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Travis "Striker" Triskle vs. Randell Martell; Travis Heibert vs. Zachary Atkinson; David Dalrymple vs. Harold Brun; Devon Smith vs. Kevin Legasse [title fight].

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Sergey Romanov v. Magomed Sultanakhmedov

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: While teaching the cat people of a planet war strategy Oon wanders from lecture to lecture feeling unneeded and worthless Gillian discovers the planet houses a Nightwalker which is kept behind enormous tall doors and sealed with a gold symbol

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Unknown to Herc he falls into a trap set by Saw Boss when he wins a bet and the map to Dream World Helicia keeper of Dream World must accept them or face destruction from Saw Boss Everything goes beautifully

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM is manipulating a tribe of aboriginals with holographic projections of flying rocks The aboriginals think its their god Mimi VENOM is after the secret treasure chamber of Mimi Scott and T-Bob get mixed up with the aboriginals when they think T-Bob is representing their Mimi god At the end Brad saves the day with his hocus pocus mask

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Researchers in Africa discover a Golden Scarab which they believe to be part of a hidden treasure that belonged to a lost tribe of Egypt Of course VENOM is after the treasure themselves Sly Rax accidentally triggers an ancient device in an underground lake that creates an opening in the walls of Solomons Gorge and reveals the treasure MASK must stop VENOM from escaping with the treasure

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: While the N team tries to get Simons memory back Mother Brain gets King Hippo and Eggplant Wizard to brainwash him into thinking hes an N-Team hunter Later Simon believes he is Donkey Kong Jr

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Lana Simon and Duke go to the Mirror World to rescue the princess father King Charles In the mean time their opposites are on a journey to their world

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids accidentally find Zandoras Box which can open doorways to many other places This may be their best chance of getting home but only Zandora herself knows how to use the box and she is trapped somewhere inside it

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The team encounters a band of children from another planet whose spaceship might bring them all home The only problem is that the ship is in Vengers hands
